creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:
I added your patch as a new hunk to the existing configure patch but
it failed to apply. Should I have replaced the file?

Can you please send a diff against the port with the changes I should
test? (no new timeout should be needed)

===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for coreutils-8.12
1 out of 2 hunks failed--saving rejects to configure.rej
=> Patch patch-configure failed to apply cleanly.
*** [do-patch] Error code 1

-- 
Eitan Adler
Source & Ports committer
X11, Bugbusting teams
